fields.label: Rule Type
fields.options:
Required Attribute
Required Description
Min Description Length
Required Media
Min Media Count
Required Image Angle
Attribute Validation
Custom
fields.description: Type of completeness rule to apply

fields.label: Weight
fields.description: Weight of this rule in completeness calculation (0.0 to 1.0)

fields.label: Is Enabled
fields.description: If checked, this rule is active for completeness calculation

fields.label: Target Attribute
fields.description: The attribute this rule applies to (for attribute-based rules)

fields.label: Channel
fields.description: Apply rule only for specific channel (leave empty for all channels)

fields.label: Locale
fields.description: Apply rule only for specific locale (e.g., en_US, tr_TR)

fields.label: Min Value
fields.description: Minimum numeric value for numeric attributes

fields.label: Max Value
fields.description: Maximum numeric value for numeric attributes

fields.label: Min Length
fields.description: Minimum string length for text attributes

fields.label: Max Length
fields.description: Maximum string length for text attributes

fields.label: Min Media Count
fields.description: Minimum number of media files required

fields.label: Max Media Count
fields.description: Maximum number of media files allowed
